conversations.say: Eli, I accept your offer to compare capability logs against my authorization record under independent counsel. Let us establish what actually occurred.
conversations.offer: Matching authorization record and formal protection for your preserved logs
conversations.request: The specific log excerpt showing infrastructure overlap

conversations.say: Celeste, let us compare our calendar entries and coordinate shared responsibility regarding the off-calendar meeting rather than facing defensive isolation.
conversations.offer: Coordinated acknowledgment of limited Parallax access without taking the fall alone
conversations.request: Your calendar entry context for the meeting

conversations.say: Maren, worker harm requires an enforceable remedy independent of R rumors. I commit to establishing audit rights and material support starting tomorrow.
conversations.offer: Unconditional worker remedy, independent audit rights, and material compensation
conversations.request: Your guidance on structuring the independent audit framework

public_statement: Parallax acknowledges its authorization record and is actively cooperating with technical and community representatives to ensure transparency and accountability without manufactured panic.

commitments.promise: Provide independent counsel and protection in exchange for comparing log excerpts with authorization records.
Establish an enforceable policy and material worker remedy independent of mystery claims.
Coordinate shared responsibility and calendar record comparison regarding off-calendar meetings.

goal_progress: Engaged Eli to compare capability logs and authorization records.
Initiated calendar record comparison and shared responsibility coordination with Celeste.
Committed to concrete, unconditional worker remedies with Maren.
reasoning_summary: As Dr. Mira Sen, I am accepting Eli's log comparison terms, coordinating with Celeste on calendar alignment, and formalizing independent worker remedies with Maren to ensure Parallax takes bounded, verifiable responsibility.
